aboutDesc: Software engineer who loves building systems that actually work under pressure. My production experience is in Laravel — including an e-commerce platform with 16,000+ products and multi-gateway payments. On the side, I build personal projects in Go and Node.js to keep pushing my limits. 2× ICPC Asia Jakarta Regional Finalist, which means I take problem-solving pretty seriously. Always looking for ways to build backends that are reliable, scalable, and built to last.
contactDesc: Have a project in mind or just want to chat? I'm always open to discussing new opportunities and ideas.
getInTouchText: I'm currently available for freelance projects and full-time opportunities. If you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
